title: Basic JavaScript Destructuring Assignment
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Destructuring Assignment. Focus on implementing Array destructuring patterns correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Destructuring Assignment
description: Create a function that uses Array destructuring patterns and Object destructuring patterns together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Destructuring Assignment Project
description: Build a small application that applies Array destructuring patterns, Object destructuring patterns, Default values in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Destructuring Assignment
description: The following code has bugs related to Array destructuring patterns. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Destructuring Assignment
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Array destructuring patterns and Object destructuring patterns.
